title: Reflect / Autonomous Mode Loop
entry_condition: CLI arg --reflect <SCRIPT_PATH> provided; agent thread already started
activity_flow: YES → spec.loader.exec_module(mod)  — hot-reload; update _mt; print '[Reflect] reloaded'
ACTION: task = mod.check()  — autonomous.py always returns fixed '[AUTO]' prompt
ON_ERROR in check() → print '[Reflect] check() error: {e}'; continue (back to LOOP_START)
ACTION: dq = agent.put_task(task, source='reflect')  — enqueues task; returns display_queue
DRAIN LOOP: while 'done' not in item: item = dq.get(timeout=120)
ON_ERROR in drain → print '[Reflect] drain error: {e}'; result='[ERROR] {e}'
ACTION: result = item['done']  — full LLM response text
ACTION: append to log file 'temp/reflect_logs/{script_name}_{YYYY-MM-DD}.log' → '[MM-DD HH:MM]\n{result}\n'
YES → on_done(result)  — autonomous.py does NOT define on_done
YES → print '[Reflect] ONCE=True, exiting.'; break → END

key_methods.spec_from_file_location: importlib.util — builds module spec from file path
key_methods.exec_module(mod): loads/reloads reflect script in-place; called on initial load and on mtime change
key_methods.mod.check(): reflect script hook — returns task string or None; autonomous.py always returns '[AUTO]' prompt
key_methods.agent.put_task(task, source='reflect'): enqueues task dict {query, source, images, output:Queue}; returns display_queue
key_methods.dq.get(timeout=120): blocks until LLM chunk/done item available
key_methods.mod.on_done(result): optional post-task callback in reflect script; absent in autonomous.py
key_methods.time.sleep(INTERVAL): polling interval; default 5s; autonomous.py sets 1800s (30 min)

autonomous_py_config.check_return: [AUTO]🤖 用户已经离开超过30分钟，作为自主智能体，请阅读自动化sop，执行自动任务。

branching_conditions: check() raises Exception → log error, continue loop
check() returns None → skip, continue loop
check() returns string → trigger agent task
drain timeout/error + ONCE=False → log error, continue loop
data_flow: agent.run() thread drains task_queue → agent_runner_loop → LLM
important_notes: Hot-reload: script is re-exec'd in-place when file mtime changes — allows runtime config updates without restart
autonomous.py ONCE=False means infinite polling every 30 minutes
autonomous.py check() is unconditional — always fires after each INTERVAL (no external trigger check)
drain loop uses dq.get(timeout=120) — 2-minute hard timeout per task
Log file is date-partitioned: {script_name}_{YYYY-MM-DD}.log, appended each trigger
source='reflect' is passed to put_task — distinguishes reflect-triggered tasks from user/task inputs
agent.run() runs on a daemon thread; put_task is thread-safe via queue.Queue
